title: HanyaWeapons
body:
This mod adds new anime/video game inspired weapons into Minecraft mainly meant for use with EFM. 

What this adds:
- Many new weapons
- Unique and fun bosses (Coming soon)
- New structures (Very Soon)

Overall this mod aims to expand Minecrafts boring weapon catalogue. Download and have fun!

"Will you port to X?" - If I feel like it.

Technicals:
EFM Compatible
1.20.1 ONLY
